login.heading: Portal Login
login.subheading: Enter your credentials to access the Portal.
login.hubDesc: The Supreme Council of Kenya Muslims (SUPKEM) Digital Hub. Fostering unity, transparency, and community progress across the nation.

register.heading: Join SUPKEM
register.subheading: Become a recognized member of the Supreme Council of Kenya Muslims.
register.joinDesc: Create your account to start organization registration and access official Muslim services in Kenya.
register.successDesc: Your membership application has been received. We will review your details and contact you shortly.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email to receive a reset link.

verifyEmail.heading: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.desc: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox and click the link to continue.

resetPassword.heading: Set New Password
resetPassword.subheading: Choose a strong, secure password for your account.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. Redirecting you to login...
resetPassword.identityDesc: Passwords are the first line of defense. By updating your credentials, you ensure your workspace remains protected under SUPKEM standards.
